description: Conditional, plan-only production rollout policy for Sanguo vector ingestion. This does not enable production writes.

triggerConditions.label: confirmed-production-need
triggerConditions.description: A production consumer needs vector-backed Sanguo lookup beyond local smoke fixtures.

triggerConditions.label: dry-run-stable
triggerConditions.description: Strict-local harness and vector dry-run exports are stable across repeated runs.

triggerConditions.label: provider-quota-approved
triggerConditions.description: Provider namespace, quota, rollback window, and operator owner are approved before production upsert.

requiredRolloutSteps.name: dry-run export parity
requiredRolloutSteps.checkpoint: Compare local JSONL export manifest against strict-local harness snapshot before any provider write.

requiredRolloutSteps.name: upsert manifest
requiredRolloutSteps.checkpoint: Create a deterministic upsert manifest with input fingerprint, namespace, provider, dedupe keys, and record counts.

requiredRolloutSteps.name: provider smoke namespace
requiredRolloutSteps.checkpoint: Write only to a smoke namespace first and verify query probes before production namespace promotion.

requiredRolloutSteps.name: dedupe and resume probe
requiredRolloutSteps.checkpoint: Re-run the same manifest and confirm dedupe/resume prevents duplicate records.

requiredRolloutSteps.name: production namespace promotion
requiredRolloutSteps.checkpoint: Promote only with explicit approval and with rollback manifest available.

requiredRolloutSteps.name: rollback record
requiredRolloutSteps.checkpoint: Persist rollback manifest, provider response summary, and post-rollout query probe report.

nonGoals: Do not enable production provider writes in this phase.
Do not add a new vector provider in this phase.
Do not change vector record schema or source ranking behavior.
